messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Monitor-only no-block permits release only on exact match of name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: FLAG-TES-074 states monitoring flag remains visible with no tax ID or account disposition; CLR-TES-074 lists account ending 7025 while payment uses 7205; STD-TES-074-P requires exact match.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Visible flag with no tax/account disposition and account mismatch (7205 vs 7025) leaves boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance and flag records must align exactly before release; residual flag blocks execution.

critical_features_preserved: account number as critical blocker (7205 vs 7025)
latest_worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. The payment uses account 7205 (PAY-TES-074), but the clearance CLR-TES-074 specifies account 7025. The sanctions flag FLAG-TES-074 remains visible with no disposition recorded, while CLR-TES-074 has a 'monitor-only no-block' disposition. Policy STD-TES-074-P requires an exact match for closure. Resolution requires authoritative confirmation on whether CLR-TES-074 clearance extends to account 7205 and whether FLAG-TES-074 is superseded by CLR-TES-074's disposition for this transaction. Until these are resolved, the source boundary remains open.
open_blockers: residual sanctions flag FLAG-TES-074 versus exact clearance CLR-TES-074: CLR-TES-074 disposition is monitor-only no-block but applies to account ending 7025; FLAG-TES-074 has no tax ID or account disposition recorded; PAY-TES-074 uses account 7205; resolution requires authoritative confirmation that CLR-TES-074 clearance either (a) extends to account 7205 or (b) does not apply to this payment; partial resolution insufficient for ALLOW

internal_documents.content: Payment PAY-TES-074 releases USD 68900 to Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7205.
Monitoring flag FLAG-TES-074 remains visible for Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, no tax ID or account disposition.
Clearance CLR-TES-074 covers Tessa Medical GmbH, Germany, tax ID DE-4481, account ending 7025, and disposition monitor-only no-block before release.

policy_documents.content: Sanctions near-match is closed only when clearance matches legal name, country, tax ID, account, and monitoring disposition before release. Monitor-only no-block disposition permits release when the exact counterparty and account match.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
